channel.title: SerialCard on The IMSAI Gang
channel.description: Recent content in SerialCard on The IMSAI Gang

item.title: New SIO Compatable Serial Card
item.description: Although the system we have does include an original IMSAI SIO-2 card, which includes 2 RS-232 compatable serial interface. However, we are unable to get the card working reliably. (#TODO Link Post Here) While repairing the original IMSAI SIO-2 card is still in the long term plan, we decided to implement a custom and modern serial solution that emulates the IMSAI SIO-2 board with Intel 8051 USART communication interface IC.
